programme.title: Rob the Mob
programme.desc: Two thieving lovers stumble across a mob secret that could dismantle New York's crime syndicate.

programme.title: Clockwatchers
programme.desc: Management divides four close-knit temps to conquer the theft of office supplies.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Diary Of A Mad Black Woman
programme.desc: A woman must put her life back together after her husband of 18 years kicks her out of the house.

programme.title: A Little Bit of Heaven
programme.desc: After learning she has terminal cancer, a free-spirited young woman falls in love with her doctor.

programme.title: Mother's Day
programme.desc: A single mom learns that her ex-husband is engaged, while a widower struggles to raise two children.

programme.title: Our Idiot Brother
programme.desc: An easygoing dimwit (Paul Rudd) disrupts the lives of his three ambitious sisters.

programme.title: What to Expect When You're Expecting
programme.desc: The challenges of impending parenthood turn the lives of five couples upside down.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A chauvinist puts a romantically challenged producer (Katherine Heigl) through outrageous tests.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Kim announces a salon contest; a trip to Las Vegas gets interesting when Naja seduces a team member.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A dead man is thought to be a victim of a hit-and-run accident; a mother requests an autopsy.

programme.title: The Lifeguard
programme.desc: A reporter quits her job, returns to her old lifeguard duties, and has an affair with a teenager.

programme.title: A Birder's Guide to Everything
programme.desc: A teenage birding enthusiast (Kodi Smit-McPhee) leads his friends on a search for a rare duck.

programme.title: Driveways
programme.desc: A lonely boy goes with his mother to help clean out his late aunt's house.

programme.title: Drugstore June
programme.desc: After the pharmacy in her small town is robbed, a girl who still lives at home with her parents takes matters into her own hands to solve the crime, while at the same time trying to get over her ex-boyfriend and become more of an adult.

programme.title: Drugstore June
programme.desc: After the pharmacy in her small town is robbed, a girl who still lives at home with her parents takes matters into her own hands to solve the crime, while at the same time trying to get over her ex-boyfriend and become more of an adult.

programme.title: Labor Pains
programme.desc: A desperate woman (Lindsay Lohan) pretends to be pregnant to keep her job.

programme.title: Blackbird
programme.desc: Lily and Paul gather their daughters and loved ones at their beach home for a final family weekend.

programme.title: Mother's Day
programme.desc: A single mom learns that her ex-husband is engaged, while a widower struggles to raise two children.

programme.title: Step Up
programme.desc: A troubled guy's (Channing Tatum) dancing attracts the attention of a ballerina (Jenna Dewan).

programme.title: Breakin' All the Rules
programme.desc: The game is on and the rules are out as Jamie Foxx, Morris Chestnut, Jennifer Esposito and Gabrielle Union star in this outrageous comedy that rewrites the book of love.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Kim announces a salon contest; a trip to Las Vegas gets interesting when Naja seduces a team member.

programme.title: Love & Basketball
programme.desc: Basketball hinders two people's (Sanaa Lathan, Omar Epps) relationship.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Diary Of A Mad Black Woman
programme.desc: A woman must put her life back together after her husband of 18 years kicks her out of the house.

programme.title: Step Up
programme.desc: A troubled guy's (Channing Tatum) dancing attracts the attention of a ballerina (Jenna Dewan).

programme.title: Hearts Beat Loud
programme.desc: A father and daughter become a songwriting duo during the summer before the girl leaves for college.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Diary Of A Mad Black Woman
programme.desc: A woman must put her life back together after her husband of 18 years kicks her out of the house.

programme.title: The Short History of the Long Road
programme.desc: A teenager has to confront the reality of life on the road after tragedy strikes.

programme.title: The Short History of the Long Road
programme.desc: A teenager has to confront the reality of life on the road after tragedy strikes.
